prompt: Construct a classic two-panel internet meme. The top text reads 'Expectation:' and the bottom text 'Reality:', both in bold white Impact font with thick black outlines. The central image is a photograph capturing the humorous frustration of a hopelessly tangled mess of brightly colored Christmas lights spread across a floor.
prompt_refined: Generate a photographic image designed as a classic internet meme. The image should feature a humorous scene depicting a hopelessly tangled mess of brightly colored Christmas lights spread across a floor. Overlayed on the top of the image, the text 'Expectation:' should appear. Overlayed on the bottom of the image, the text 'Reality:' should appear. Both text elements must be in bold white Impact font with thick black outlines.
objects: a hopelessly tangled mess of Christmas lights
text "Expectation:" positioned at the top of the image
text "Reality:" positioned at the bottom of the image
bold white Impact font for text
